Her hair flows in wind-blown curls with subtle neon streaks, makeup sparkling with glitter and electric blue eyeliner. Background: surreal roller-disco dreamscape with glowing Art-Deco arches, mirror-ball constellations, neon grid floors, and swirling colored lights like a cosmic dance floor. Motion blur ribbons of light swirl around her as if the music itself is visible. embed.alt: A high-energy, funny Japanese TV commercial for 「サトー咳止めドロップ」(Sato Cough Drops), styled like modern Japanese variety-show ads. Opens with a sudden comedic cough in total silence—WHAM smash cut to a colorful, hyper-expressive cute mascot (round, overconfident, slightly unhinged) popping into frame with exaggerated motion lines. Rapid-fire montage: office worker coughing during a meeting, ramen shop chef coughing over steaming noodles, schoolgirl coughing on a train platform. Final 2 seconds: clean, heroic product shot on a bright background, mascot strikes a triumphant pose, bold Japanese title slams on screen: 「サトー咳止めドロップ」, followed by a cheerful spoken tagline in Japanese as the music hits a cute final note.

images.alt: EVENT TECHNOLOGY: DON’T RE-INVENT THE WHEEL Meeting professionals are focusing too much on new event technologies, and ignoring existing methods that will improve events—at a fraction of the cost. REMEMBER THE 1970S TELEVISION SERIES The Six Million Dollar Man? It featured a former astronaut whose limbs and eye were replaced with bionic implants, allowing him to perform super-human feats. The show’s opening catch phrase “We can rebuild him…we have the technology” highlights our fascination with improving our lives via better gadgets and software. Today’s event professionals aren’t immune from the allure of new technology. Industry conferences incorporate the latest and greatest mobile and gamification apps, video-streaming platforms, attendee tracking systems, audience response systems, mobile networking and registrant analytics. Suppliers are happy to sponsor these events, using them to showcase their wares and, hopefully, convince participants that their new technology is worth buying…

もう既に金沢で泊まる宿の予約も取っているだけに…

今回は加賀藩の防衛ラインと加賀騒動の一方の主役である抵抗勢力側の前田土佐守資料館をみてきたいわけですが、なんとか6月初旬までに騒擾が収束することを願うばかり。

舘ひろし→日テレ版風林火山

柴田恭兵→NHK大河ドラマ武田信玄

仲村トオルは大河ドラマで秀吉だったしな…

石油不足による不安のせいか、高市早苗をボロクソに叩きたがる左向きやら悲観論だらけのTLにイヤ気が差しました。

生成AIにムチャ振りをさせて遊び倒すしかないのかな、今のうちに。
という考えになってるのが…
まぁ6月に金沢城と高岡城の縄張を楽しめるよう、事態が好転することを祈るしかないですわね。
